contents:
[package]
name = "morse_player"
version = "0.1.2"
edition = "2024"

[dependencies]
rodio = "0.22.2"
tokio-util = "0.7.18"
serde_json = "1.0"
strum = "0.28.0"
strum_macros = "0.28.0"

[dependencies.derive_more]
version = "2.1.1"
features = ["debug"]

[dependencies.tokio]
version = "1.50.0"
features = ["full"]
